options.command: npx tsx -e "import { deepAgentsMemoryPythonModule } from './cockpit/deep-agents/memory/python/src/index.ts'; const mod = deepAgentsMemoryPythonModule; if (mod.id !== 'deep-agents-memory-python') throw new Error('Unexpected id: ' + mod.id); if (mod.title !== 'Deep Agents Memory (Python)') throw new Error('Unexpected title: ' + mod.title); console.log(JSON.stringify({ id: mod.id, title: mod.title }));"
